backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining EnrollmentApplication and StudentQuestion types with functions to submit and retrieve applications and questions, storing them in lists with timestamps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: burgundy/white color scheme for questions form and prominent success message display after form submission.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing components, hooks, and styling for the COBAD 35 website application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, primary, and accent colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing all major sections: HeroSection, AboutSection, EnrollmentForm, QuestionsForm, ContactButtons, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Section displaying four benefit cards with icons and images highlighting academic excellence, collaborative environment, modern facilities, and proven success.
frontend/src/components/ContactButtons.t: Fixed floating buttons for WhatsApp and Instagram contact with deep links to open respective apps with pre-filled messages.
frontend/src/components/EnrollmentForm.t: Enrollment form with validation for student information fields, backend submission via mutation hook, error handling, and success confirmation display.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer displaying school information, contact details, hours, copyright notice, and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section with background image overlay, school branding, tagline, and call-to-action buttons with smooth scroll to enrollment and about sections.
frontend/src/components/QuestionsForm.ts: React component for a questions/doubts form with fields for name, email, phone, and question text. Includes validation, submission via useSubmitQuestion hook, and displays a success message with school branding after submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options for idle handling and derivation origins.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Custom React Query hooks for submitting and fetching applications and questions data through the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm educational color palette (terracotta, peach, golden yellow) and burgundy accent colors for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), OKLCH color system using CSS variables, burgundy color variants, and custom animations for accordions.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing a COBAD 35 school website with enrollment forms, questions system, WhatsApp/Instagram integration, and warm burgundy color scheme implementation across multiple features.
